title: microsorum rubidum
intro: Microsorum rubidum, also known as the Red Rattlesnake Fern, is a type of flowering plant in the family Polypodiaceae, commonly found in Southeast Asia. Traditionally, Microsorum rubidum has been used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which help to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The medicinal properties of Microsorum rubidum are attributed to its rich content of flavonoids, alkaloids, and other bioactive compounds that provide various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and protecting against oxidative stress. In traditional herbal preparations, Microsorum rubidum is often dried and made into tea or infused in hot water to harness its medicinal properties.
